action_text: Click the "Expense Lines" link in the All menu
rationale: Directly opens the required "Expense Lines" module under the "Cost" application, which is the first step of the goal.

action_text: Press Enter in the All menu filter field
rationale: Pressing Enter in the All menu filter often navigates to the top matching module; this could quickly open "Expense Lines" without clicking.
If a single click doesn’t trigger navigation due to UI latency, a double-click on the module item may ensure it opens.

action_text: Toggle the "Cost" application section in the All menu
rationale: Ensures the "Cost" application section is expanded so the "Expense Lines" module is visible and clickable (useful if it collapses).

action_text: Type "Expense Lines" into the global Search field
rationale: Alternative navigation path: using the global search to find and navigate to the "Expense Lines" list if the All menu interaction fails.
